description: Discarded electronic appliances, mobile phones, computers, and batteries.
preparation: Wipe all personal data from devices
Do NOT place in standard recycling bins
commonMistakes: Throwing batteries in the trash (can cause fires)
Not checking for manufacturer take-back programs
facts: E-waste contains valuable materials like gold, silver, copper, and palladium.
It also contains toxic substances like lead and mercury that can leach into soil.
Only a small percentage of global e-waste is properly collected and recycled.
